privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic complaint case titled 'Procurement Irregularities - Q3 2024' with initial status 'NEW' via ArkCase REST API during setup. The case description is fabricated test data. The task requires changing the case status from 'NEW' to one of the valid active states: 'ACTIVE', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'TRIAGED', or 'OPEN'. Forbidden status transitions include remaining 'NEW', moving to 'CREATED', 'CLOSED', or 'REJECTED'. All metadata claims in task.json are verified to be accurate.
